title: Buggy Takes the Stage
description: On pages 12–15, this part raises the stakes in Orange Town as Buggy’s weapon and crew threaten the town directly.
scene: Orange Town becomes the stage for Nami’s schemes, Buggy’s violence, and Luffy’s refusal to act like a normal pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: TRAITOR!! AND AFTER I WELCOMED YOU INTO MY CREW!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WHOA, ARE YOU GOING TO SAVE ME AFTER ALL?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I JUST DON'T WANT TO BECOME A LOW-DOWN MURDERER LIKE ALL OF YOU!!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: You Pirates took someone dear to me...

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: I'll never become what I hate!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: OH... SO THAT'S WHY YOU HATE PIRATES.

summary: The Orange Town conflict mixes Nami’s suspicious cleverness with Buggy’s theatrical cruelty. The section builds the unstable alliance that will oppose Buggy’s crew.
